name: Garden Guardian
short_description: Take control of master gardener Snippy Shrubs and keep your garden safe at all costs! A new take on classic LCD games, rethought through a modern lens! Complete objectives through 18 Trial levels, or hop into the four Endless levels to show that you can garden with the best of them!
detailed_description:
Take control of master gardener Snippy Shrubs and keep your garden safe at all costs!

A new take on classic LCD games, rethought through a modern lens! Complete objectives through the Trial levels, or hop into Endless to show that you can garden with the best of them!

Features:

  • Dynamic Difficulty System - As you collect more points, the game and music speed will steadily ramp up! Keep your cool as the pressure builds!

  • Trial Mode - 18 objective based levels to work your way through.

  • Endless Mode - Four increasingly difficult score attack variations.

  • Unlockables - Over 50 unique pieces of art to unlock as you hit various milestones.

  • Stats & Awards - Unlock content by hitting various stat-based milestones! Unlock thirteen in-game Awards to earn even more!

  • Teaching Tools - An in-depth tutorial stage to get you started, plus a series of unlockable Tips that delve deep into advanced maneuvers.

Garden Guardian supports the Plant-for-the-Planet organization.

Climate change affects us all, and individual change is not the solution. For every sale of Garden Guardian, we will donate $0.20 CAD to the Plant-for-the-Planet organization. Although Garden Guardian is a small game, we hope that over time we can help to plant thousands of trees through this initiative, and we hope we can encourage other game developers and publishers to consider joining in to pledge financial support to vital environmental, social, and communal efforts.
